description_for_model: Use the Old Family Recipe API to save, search, OCR-import, edit, and meal-plan family recipes. Every recipe carries provenance: source_person (who made it), story (why it matters), and origin_year. Prefer recipe_import_image for photographed handwritten cards. Prefer recipe_search before creating duplicates. Use family_invite to share with relatives — pass the relationship (sister/cousin/etc.) when known so the family tree stays meaningful. Free tier: 250 Sage AI messages/month plus unlimited recipe storage. See https://oldfamilyrecipe.ai/spec for the full Recipe Protocol.
description_for_human: Save, search, and preserve family recipes — including OCR import of handwritten recipe cards — straight from your AI assistant.

auth.instructions: Get a free API key at https://oldfamilyrecipe.ai/dashboard. Send it as `Authorization: Bearer ofr_...`. The MCP server reads it from the OFR_API_KEY env var.

_comment: Legacy ChatGPT plugin manifest format (https://platform.openai.com/docs/plugins). OpenAI deprecated public plugins in early 2024 in favor of GPT Actions and (since 2025) MCP. This file is kept for any non-ChatGPT AI surfaces that still consume the ai-plugin.json convention and as a one-stop machine-readable summary for crawlers. The canonical machine-readable manifests are .well-known/mcp.json (for MCP clients) and spec/openapi.yaml (for the HTTP API).
